dashboard.label: Threat Hunting Dashboard
dashboard.description: Proactive threat hunting - suspicious processes, network anomalies, DNS analysis, and user behavior

search.query: index=sysmon EventCode=1 Computer=$target_host$ | stats count as ExecCount, dc(Computer) as HostCount, values(Computer) as Hosts, values(CommandLine) as Commands by Image | where ExecCount < 5 | sort ExecCount | head 20

index=proxy sourcetype=proxy action=allowed | sort src_ip, dest, _time | streamstats current=f window=2 last(_time) as prev by src_ip, dest | eval interval=_time - prev | where interval > 30 AND interval < 3600 | stats count as c, avg(interval) as avg_i, stdev(interval) as std_i by src_ip, dest | where c > 15 | eval jitter=round(std_i/avg_i*100,1) | where jitter < 25 | sort jitter | head 20 | rename src_ip as "Source", dest as "Destination", c as "Connections", avg_i as "Avg Interval(s)", jitter as "Jitter%"

index=dns sourcetype=dns | eval sub_len=len(mvindex(split(query,"."),0)) | where sub_len > 30 | rex field=query "\.(?<basedomain>[^\.]+\.[^\.]+)$" | stats count, dc(query) as unique, avg(sub_len) as avg_len by src_ip, basedomain | where count > 50 | sort -count

index=sysmon EventCode=1 | where match(Image, "(?i)(\\\\Temp\\\\|\\\\Downloads\\\\|\\\\AppData\\\\Local\\\\Temp)") | stats count, dc(Computer) as hosts, values(CommandLine) as cmds by Image | sort -count | head 15

index=wineventlog sourcetype=WinEventLog:Security EventCode=4624 LogonType IN (2,10) | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H") | where hour < 6 OR hour > 22 | stats count as Logons, dc(ComputerName) as Hosts, values(ComputerName) as HostList by TargetUserName | sort -Logons | head 15

index=sysmon EventCode=1 | where match(ParentImage, "(?i)(winword|excel|outlook|powerpnt)") AND match(Image, "(?i)(cmd|powershell|wscript|cscript|mshta)") | table _time, Computer, User, ParentImage, Image, CommandLine | head 20
